categories.name: L402 / Machine Payments
categories.description: Make APIs payable, discoverable, and consumable by people and agents.

repos.name: toll-booth
repos.description: Any API becomes a Lightning toll booth in one line. L402 middleware for Express, Hono, Deno, Bun, and Workers.

repos.name: 402-announce
repos.description: Announce HTTP 402 services on Nostr for decentralised discovery using kind 31402.

repos.name: 402-mcp
repos.description: MCP client for AI agents to discover, pay for, and consume L402 and x402 APIs.

repos.name: 402-pub
repos.description: Live directory at 402.pub for Lightning-paid APIs.

repos.name: toll-booth-announce
repos.description: Bridge between toll-booth and 402-announce for Nostr service announcements.

repos.name: toll-booth-dvm
repos.description: Expose any toll-booth-gated API as a NIP-90 Data Vending Machine on Nostr.

repos.name: toll-booth-mcp
repos.description: MCP server with read-only analytics and widget UIs for toll-booth deployments.

repos.name: 402-indexer
repos.description: Nostr-native crawler that discovers L402 and x402 paid APIs.

repos.name: payment-methods
repos.description: Specifications for HTTP Payment Authentication methods (Lightning, Cashu, Session).

repos.name: aperture-phoenixd
repos.description: Phoenixd backend for Aperture. No LND required.

repos.name: aperture-announce
repos.description: Announce Aperture L402 services on Nostr for decentralised discovery.

categories.name: Spatial / Meeting
categories.description: Build location-aware workflows and fair meeting-point tools.

repos.name: geohash-kit
repos.description: Zero-dependency geohash toolkit for encoding, decoding, polygon coverage, and Nostr location filters.

repos.name: rendezvous-kit
repos.description: Find fair meeting points for N participants with isochrone intersection, venue search, and fairness scoring.

repos.name: rendezvous-mcp
repos.description: MCP server for AI-driven fair meeting-point discovery.

categories.name: Identity / Access
categories.description: Spoken verification, deterministic Nostr identities, encrypted access control, and decentralised identity verification.

repos.name: spoken-token
repos.description: Derive time-rotating, human-speakable verification tokens from a shared secret.

repos.name: nsec-tree
repos.description: Deterministic Nostr sub-identity derivation. One master secret, unlimited unlinkable identities.

repos.name: nsec-tree-cli
repos.description: Offline-first CLI for nsec-tree with derivation, proofs, and Shamir recovery.

repos.name: canary-kit
repos.description: Deepfake-proof identity verification with per-member spoken words, silent duress detection, encrypted group sync.

repos.name: signet
repos.description: Decentralised identity verification for Nostr. 4 verification tiers, ZKP age proofs, Signet IQ.

repos.name: dominion
repos.description: Epoch-based encrypted access control. HKDF content keys, AES-256-GCM, Shamir secret sharing, tiered audiences.

categories.name: AI Agents
categories.description: Give AI agents sovereign Nostr identities with trust-aware tooling.

repos.name: bray
repos.description: Trust-aware Nostr MCP for AI and humans. 200+ tools across identity, social, payments, dispatch, moderation, privacy, and encrypted access. Model-agnostic AI-to-AI collaboration over encrypted Nostr DMs.

repos.name: nostr-veil
repos.description: Anonymous trust assertions for Nostr. LSAG ring signatures over NIP-85.

repos.name: nostr-attestations
repos.description: One Nostr event kind for all attestations. NIP-VA (kind 31000).

categories.name: Cryptographic Primitives
categories.description: Standalone cryptographic building blocks used across the ecosystem.

repos.name: ring-sig
repos.description: SAG and LSAG ring signatures on secp256k1 for anonymous group membership proofs.

repos.name: range-proof
repos.description: Pedersen commitment range proofs on secp256k1 for proving a value is in range without revealing it.

repos.name: shamir-core
repos.description: Shamir's Secret Sharing over GF(256) with core utilities.

repos.name: shamir-words
repos.description: Split secrets into human-readable BIP-39 word shares using Shamir's Secret Sharing.

categories.name: Compliance
categories.description: Work with jurisdiction and professional-registry intelligence.

repos.name: jurisdiction-kit
repos.description: Professional body registries and jurisdiction intelligence for 30+ countries.

categories.name: Protocol / Standards
categories.description: Nostr protocol extensions and conformance testing.

repos.name: nip-drafts
repos.description: 30 Nostr protocol extensions: service coordination, trust, payments, disputes, key hierarchy, encrypted access.

repos.name: trott-conformance
repos.description: Protocol conformance test suite. Lifecycle fixtures for TROTT task kinds.
